package.name: go2_sim
package.description:
Go2 Gazebo Fortress (Ignition Gazebo 6) + CHAMP simulation.
Provides go2_sim.urdf.xacro with: - Fully articulated 12-DOF leg model (from khaledgabr77/unitree_go2_ros2) - CHAMP-convention foot links: LF_FOOT, RF_FOOT, LH_FOOT, RH_FOOT - Foot contact sensors (Fortress contact sensor syntax) - IMU sensor at imu_link (200 Hz, Fortress imu sensor syntax) - Unitree L1 LiDAR via sensor_models/l1_lidar macro → /lidar/points (bridged) - ign_ros2_control effort joint trajectory controller (12 joints) - Joint state publisher → /joint_states
Launch: ros2 launch go2_sim sim_champ.launch.py
Fortress packages required (ROS 2 Humble): ros-humble-ros-ign-bridge ros-humble-ros-ign-gazebo ros-humble-ign-ros2-control ros-humble-champ-base ros-humble-robot-localization
